ARC-024.rationale: Governance 2026-03-19: ARC-024 split. Claim was spanning two layers — philosophical/foundational (death/love as asymptotic limits, derived from INV-025-029) and behavioral/capability-expansion prediction (love expands under intelligence). The demotion trigger was correct insofar as the behavioral layer needs more work, but the philosophical layer is architecturally well-supported by EXQ-028/029. Resolved by: splitting behavioral prediction to ARC-026 (candidate, v3); retaining ARC-024 at provisional (not demoting to candidate). Conflict experiment pool reflects ARC-026 scope. No demotion applied.
ARC-024.selected_option: Hold at provisional — split resolved conflict scope

ARC-026.rationale: Two PASS pillars on different methodologies: EXQ-232 (2026-04-05, phased E3 supervision, 4/4 criteria 3/3 seeds) + EXQ-507 (2026-05-03, capacity sweep world_dim {16,32,64} with random-action policy, weak-reading 'no crowding-out'). exp_conf=0.725, lit_conf=0.802, confirmed_established quadrant, conflict_ratio=0.286 below provisional gate. Strong reading (genuinely expanded long-horizon care) remains substrate-pending. Flips registry candidate -> provisional.
ARC-026.selected_option: Promote now (two PASS pillars on different methodologies)

Q-011.rationale: Applied approved promotion decision from governance queue.

Q-012.rationale: User accepted demotion recommendation. Evidence 4:4 supports/weakens split (conflict_ratio=1.0, confidence=0.503); all experimental evidence is synthetic (archived ree-v2 scaffolding). Insufficient signal to hold as active question. Demotion to candidate applied in claims.yaml 2026-02-26. Status reflects candidate pending genuine ree-v1-minimal discriminative experiment.

Q-013.rationale: Adjudicated Q-013 to hybridize: keep deterministic JEPA baseline with derived dispersion as default, while preserving a guarded stochastic-head branch as an interface candidate pending discriminative calibration evidence.

Q-014.rationale: Adjudicated Q-014 to hybridize: preserve invariance for robustness but require explicit ethical-relevance probes and fallback pathways when invariance suppresses responsibility-relevant distinctions.

Q-015.rationale: Applied anti-lock-in dispatch recommendation: retain_ree; basis=conflict_below_hybrid_threshold; conflict_ratio=0.667; overall_confidence=0.586.

Q-016.rationale: Keep Q-016 open with explicit probe-plan requirement; tri-loop conflict arbitration policy remains an unresolved design-space question pending targeted mechanism tests.

Q-017.rationale: Reaffirmed Q-017 as hybridized: retain REE orthogonal control-axis framing while using external priors only through interface-level guardrails; resolve via scoped axis-ablation follow-ups.

Q-019.rationale: User confirmed: narrow Q-019 into testable V3 sub-questions targeting the BG three-gate vs single-gate distinction. ARC-021 direction (three distinct loops with incommensurable errors) is the working hypothesis; V3 experiment design should isolate each loop independently before testing full three-gate interaction.
Q-019.selected_option: Narrow the question into testable sub-questions (higher tractability)

Q-020.rationale: Q-020 already resolved via literature synthesis (Resolution A, 2026-04-02): ARC-007 and MECH-073 are co-true. Experimental FAILs (EXQ-266 x2, conditions identical) flagged for /diagnose-errors. The question is closed at the resolution level; experimental validation requires separate /diagnose-errors investigation.
Q-020.selected_option: Narrow the question into testable sub-questions (higher tractability)

Q-021.rationale: Two independent pathways to behavioral flatness identified (Pathway A: drive absence, ARC-030; Pathway B: self-incoherence-gated commit suppression, MECH-113/114). Discriminative experiment design specified in evidence_quality_note.
Q-021.selected_option: Narrow the question into testable sub-questions (higher tractability)

Q-022.rationale: Three-regime dissociation experiment design specified: Normal training (low D_eff + high stability), Noise perturbation (high D_eff + low stability), Structured novel perturbation (low D_eff + low stability). Target: distinguish Regime 3 from Regime 2 empirically.
Q-022.selected_option: Narrow the question into testable sub-questions (higher tractability)

Q-023.rationale: Three-step programme: (1) prove base REE is ordinal potential game; (2) show MECH-127 counterfactual utility breaks standard framework; (3) characterize extended framework. EXQ-160 superseded -- implementation gap.
Q-023.selected_option: Narrow the question into testable sub-questions (higher tractability)

Q-024.rationale: EXQ-161 superseded (dry-run artifact; implementation gap -- policy trained with entropy bonus only, z_world/z_self detached). Question narrowing applied to focus on discriminating DESCRIPTIVE vs PRESCRIPTIVE vs DIAGNOSTIC trajectory representations. Fresh experiment required.
Q-024.selected_option: Narrow the question into testable sub-questions (higher tractability)

Q-033.rationale: Narrow Q-033. Operationalise as: (1) Can latent-state estimation from actigraphy reconstruct sleep-phase sufficiency relative to waking MEL load? (2) Does MEL-mismatch index predict failure type (NREM vs REM deficit) better than total sleep time? Clinical translation question -- depends on INV-050/051, MECH-179/180 experimental validation first.
Q-033.selected_option: Narrow the question into testable sub-questions (higher tractability)

Q-036.rationale: Apply narrow_open_question. Lit-pull identified candidate variables (persistence, recovery failure, uncontrollability, inescapability, prediction error). Sub-question scaffolding should map each to a testable experiment design. No status change to the open question.
Q-036.selected_option: Narrow the question into testable sub-questions (higher tractability)

Q-037.rationale: implementation_phase=v3, no V3 experimental runs yet. epistemic_category=substrate_conditional. Lit-pull 2026-05-02 raised lit_conf to 0.823 but no exp evidence yet. Standard V3-pending hold. No status change.
Q-037.selected_option: Wait for V3 substrate implementation (correct path)

Q-040.rationale: Apply narrow_open_question. Decomposed into Q-040.a (factorial 2x2 of {MECH-269b OFF/ON} x {SD-032b OFF/ON} on EXQ-483a retest -- load-bearing arbitration), Q-040.b (alternative-hypothesis isolator: is the upstream blocker MECH-295 liking-stream wiring? cross-witness EXQ-536b force-arm probe), Q-040.c (mechanism quantification: dACC weight delta proportional to |precision-weighted forward-PE|? EXQ-475a-conditions retest). Empirical resolution gated on StepHarness migration + MECH-307 substrate + MECH-269b V_s-rollout-gate landing.
Q-040.selected_option: Narrow the question into testable sub-questions (higher tractability)

Q-041.rationale: Q-041 is the unified-supervisor research-anchor. The supervisor question only becomes empirically tractable once the scattered loci it would coordinate are themselves wired (SD-032c AIC, SD-032d PCC, MECH-258 precision-weighted pain PE, MECH-204 REM serotonergic precision update). All four are candidate v3_pending. Sleep substrate (MECH-204) is acknowledged top-priority unblocker. evidence_quality_note refined.
Q-041.selected_option: Wait for V3 substrate implementation (correct path)

Q-042.rationale: Q-042 status candidate_resolved. Architectural answer is biologically obvious (consequential effect of decisions cannot be processed for ongoing experimental behaviour without dual-read). Lit-pull 2026-05-08 confirmed. Hold remains empirical: (a) MECH-258 substrate implementation, (b) StepHarness-cohort retest of EXQ-475a/483c/490g/471a/524a. StepHarness substrate landed 2026-05-08; retest cohort to be authored. evidence_quality_note refined.

SD-008.rationale: Promote to stable: solid isolated validation (EXQ-023, EXQ-040), overall_conf=0.874, zero conflicts. EXQ-177 integration concern noted but attributed to SD-003/SD-007 stack composition, not SD-008 itself. Integration diagnostic is a separate workstream.

SD-011.rationale: Phase 3 cutover queue walk 2026-05-02. Met all stable gate criteria under decoupled regime: exp_conf=0.871 (>= 0.80), exp_entries=7 (>= 4), lit_entries=23 (>= 2), conflict_ratio=0.148 (<= 0.20). Direction balance 25 supports / 2 weakens / 3 mixed across the largest single-claim evidence corpus in the registry. Post-Phase-2 V3-EXQ-178b PASS (harm_fwd_r2=0.742) and EXQ-323a PASS on body-damage substrate cleared the dissociation that previously held SD-011 at provisional. Flips quadrant from confirmed_established (already) and registry status provisional -> stable.

SD-012.rationale: Phase 3 cutover queue walk 2026-05-02. Met all provisional gate criteria under decoupled regime: exp_conf=0.714 (>= 0.62), exp_entries=5 (>= 2), conflict_ratio=0.20 (<= 0.35), genuine_exp_supports >= 1. Direction balance 18 supports / 2 weakens / 1 mixed. Substrate has been implemented since 2026-04-02 (drive_weight=2.0 default in REEConfig.from_dims) -- this promotion is the registry catching up to substrate state. Flips registry status candidate -> provisional.
SD-012.selected_option: Promote now (faster convergence; substrate already in place)
